title: cansjera malabarica
intro: Cansjera malabarica, also known as 'Snake plant of the forest', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Opiliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cansjera malabarica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves in water or oil, and it is also used in traditional medicine to prepare various decoctions and ointments.
